recovery.title: Local data was recovered
recovery.body: Some local data could not be loaded. Paprism continued with safe defaults; the affected local items may need to be configured or saved again.

network.offlineBody: Connect to Wi-Fi or mobile data, then try again.

categories.title: Categories
categories.hint: Select one or more. Feed shows papers tagged with all selected categories.
categories.noCommonPapers: No papers match every selected category
categories.noCommonPapersHint: Multiple categories use a strict intersection. Remove one or more categories to broaden the feed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appLanguageHint: Interface language. System follows your phone.
settings.translationHint: Used when you tap Translate on a paper. System follows your phone language.
settings.aboutBody1: TikTok-style feed for arXiv papers. Each device talks to arXiv directly — no account, no backend.
settings.aboutBody2: Requests are spaced at least 3 seconds apart to respect arXiv API terms of use.

reader.unavailable: Native reading is unavailable for this paper
reader.devClientTitle: This build is missing the native reader
reader.devClientBody: Rebuild and install the Paprism development client. Expo Go and older development builds do not include EnrichedMarkdown.

library.title: Library
library.emptySaved: Saved papers will show up here.
library.emptyHistory: Papers shown in your feed or opened directly will appear here.
library.clearHistoryBody: This removes your browsing history on this device.
library.pdfMetadataFailedBody: The PDF was saved, but Paprism could not remember this download. You can still find it in the folder you selected.
library.removeDownloadsBody: This removes the offline reader package and app-local PDF for this paper.

provider.title: Translation providers
provider.hint: Google works without a key. Other keys stay in encrypted device storage and are sent only to the selected HTTPS provider.
provider.name: Profile name

translation.setupBody: Select Google, or configure a provider model and API key before translating.
translation.keyMissing: The selected provider has no API key

ask.enabledHint: Show Ask in the reader toolbar and native selection menu. Disabling it keeps existing data.
ask.chatProviderHint: May differ from translation. Questions and paper passages are sent to this service.
ask.embeddingHint: Vectors are created lazily for the current paper. Ask still works with normal context if this is missing or fails.
ask.privacy: Chats, citations, vectors, and reading positions stay in the app sandbox. API keys stay in SecureStore. OpenRouter web search may cost extra.
ask.clearAll: Clear all Ask chats and paper indexes
ask.clearAllBody: This deletes local chats, citations, and paper vectors. Saved papers, history, and reading positions are kept.
ask.clearPaperBody: This deletes the chat and semantic index for this paper.
ask.setupBody: Choose or create a Chat Provider in Ask settings. Google Translate cannot answer Ask questions.
ask.empty: Ask about this paper. Select text in the reader and choose Ask to include the exact passage.
ask.interrupted: Answer interrupted. Send the question again to retry.
ask.webSearchCost: OpenRouter web search is optional per message and may cost extra.
ask.webSearchUnavailable: This provider does not support Paprism web search.
